subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are Thy servants whom Thou hast chosen for the service of Thy Cause, for the exaltation of Thy Word, and for the diffusion of Thy holy fragrances. O Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد اجتبیتهم لخدمه امرک و اعلاء کلمتک و نشر نفحات قدسک رب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Shrines and Holy places
